data.name: HeroIntro
data.value: Harpyx helps teams turn large collections of documents into organized, searchable knowledge. Instead of reading every file manually or asking an AI model to answer from memory, you give Harpyx the material you want to work with and use chat to ask questions grounded in that content.

data.name: HeroWorkflow
data.value: The normal flow is simple: choose the right tenant, create a workspace, create a project, upload files or add document links, and wait while Harpyx prepares them. After processing, the project chat can search the prepared content, retrieve the most relevant parts, and send that context to the configured model.

data.name: HeroTenantIsolation
data.value: Harpyx is built for work that must stay separated by customer, team, department, or business unit. That separation is handled through tenants, workspaces, projects, roles, and permissions, so users see and manage only the areas they are allowed to access.

data.name: HeroUseCases
data.value: Use it to explore contracts, reports, technical documentation, internal policies, research material, customer files, or any other document set where answers should come from known sources. Harpyx keeps the structure of the work visible while making the content easier to search, compare, summarise, and reuse.

data.name: OverviewDescription
data.value: Follow the normal user flow: sign in, choose the right tenant, create workspaces and projects, add documents, then ask questions over the prepared content.

data.name: AccessDescription
data.value: Learn why signing in is only the first step, how tenant membership works, and what each role can do.

data.name: ApiDescription
data.value: Understand when to use API keys, how permissions limit automation, and where to find the technical docs after sign-in.
